nodes.name: 马德雷德迪奥斯大区
nodes.summary: 马德雷德迪奥斯大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联17种鸟类，包括Fiery-capped manakin、Purple-throated cotinga、Marble-faced bristle tyrant等17种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: Stripe-chested antwren
nodes.summary: Stripe-chested antwren（Stripe-chested antwren，学名 Myrmotherula longicauda），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联10个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、人类活动扰动。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: australis: from Cusco and Madre de Dios departments in southern Peru south into northwestern Bolivia as far as Cochabamba Department In most of its range the stripe-chested antwren inhabits the edges of humid evergreen forest and also secondary forest and bamboo stands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In elevation it ranges between though only as high as in Colombia and mostly below in Ecuador. The disjunct population in Loreto, Peru, inhabits permanently flooded forest around blackwater lakes at an elevation of about

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered fairly common in Peru, "[l]ocally not uncommon" in Ecuador, and "[l]ocal and rare" in Colombia. "Although the Stripe-chested Antwren occupies habitats, such as forest edge, that often result from natural disturbance, it is vulnerable to large-scale habitat loss; the lower slopes of the Andes, where this species occurs, long have been favored for agriculture."
